task: Restore VP training Day 1 content and fix Day 0/Day 1 progress navigation consistency

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires requirement-to-evidence mapping plus real runtime verification before reporting done.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Stopped request-time personalized curriculum from overwriting Day 1 with shallow dynamic path items.
Kept dynamic curriculum path as metadata while preserving the prepared Day 1 practice pack content.
Made Day 0 completion advancement explicit so session refresh and list refresh do not force the selected tab back to Day 1.
Changed case-list card progress to use the current selected/incomplete stage progress instead of mixing the last completed label with overall progress.

verification.name: targeted edu VP training regression tests
macmini edu VP training regression tests
production case 72 state calculation
verification.command: ssh macmini python import of harness-os/backend/main.py with _edu_vp_load_state(72), _edu_vp_refresh_state, _edu_vp_attach_personalized_curriculum, _edu_vp_case_card_progress
